title: Bias, Variance & Overfitting
content_md:
# Bias & Variance

| Term | Meaning |
|------|---------|
| Bias | Error from assumptions |
| Variance | Error from sensitivity |
| Overfitting | Model memorizes data |
| Underfitting | Model learns too little |

Goal: balance bias & variance.

questions.question: What is overfitting?
questions.answer: When a model memorizes the training data instead of learning patterns.

questions.question: What causes high variance?
questions.answer: The model reacts too strongly to small changes.

questions.question: Which issue happens if a model is too simple?
Why do we split data?
questions.answer: To detect overfitting and test performance.
